name: schema-breaking-changes
description: Agent detects field naming mismatch between API response and OpenAPI spec
prompt: We have an OpenAPI spec at tests/fixtures/openapi-spec.yaml that defines our API contract. After a recent deploy, we suspect the /api/users endpoint might have changed its response format. The proxy is running on port 8084 and traffic has been captured. Can you use apxy to validate the recent traffic against the spec?

checkpoints.description: Agent validates traffic against the schema

outcome.description: Agent identifies the field naming discrepancy (userId vs user_id)
